span.p:
MMU
addr = position_pointer − offset
(pointer ++ once per sample)

span.p:
opcode = low nibble
n0 = WRITE · n3/n7/nF = READ/MAC

span.p:
decay knob → A10–A7
scales U35 gains
(deep taps drop fastest)
